response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with ~18 years of development experience and genuine developer-tooling interests (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, MCP code generators), but this is a Level II people-management role and the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership experience. Technical leadership is implied through staff titles, mentoring, and workshops rather than demonstrated org-level roadmap ownership, and mobile experience is limited to a single app-maintenance stint rather than platform-ecosystem depth.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience (18+ years) across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Authentic developer-tools track record: test runner (Trial), assertion library, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators
Strong craftsmanship culture fit: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, plus teaching via workshops and courses
concerns: No formal people-management experience (JD requires 2+ years managing engineers)
No evidence of organizational-change leadership or strategic roadmap ownership at team/org scope
Mobile-platform exposure is shallow (one iOS/Apple TV maintenance role a decade ago) versus the JD's mobile-ecosystem focus

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
